title.en: DLT SMS Registration India — Compliance Guide & Direct Route — StartMessaging

description.en: Complete guide to TRAI DLT SMS registration in India. Learn entity, header, and template approval steps, and how StartMessaging lets you send DLT-free transactional SMS instantly.

subtitle.en: DLT registration is mandatory for sending transactional SMS in India under TRAI regulations. StartMessaging simplifies compliance by using pre-registered compliant routes.

body.en: DLT (Distributed Ledger Technology) is a blockchain-based registration system mandated by TRAI. It requires all businesses to register their entity, headers, and templates to send commercial SMS. StartMessaging completely bypasses this manual setup by mapping your messages to pre-registered compliant routes automatically.

bullets.en: Prevents SMS header spoofing and spam

description.en: Register your business on Jio, Airtel, or BSNL DLT portals with identity/business documents. Takes 2-5 days.
Submit 6-character sender IDs (headers) like STRMSG for approval. Takes 2-3 days.
Submit exact message layouts with variables. Takes 1-3 days per template.
Skip all steps. Sign up, get API keys, and use our pre-registered DLT templates instantly.

question.en: Is DLT registration mandatory in India?

answer.en: Yes. TRAI mandates DLT registration for all commercial SMS in India. However, with StartMessaging, you use our pre-registered routes for transactional messages, so you don't need to register yourself. For promotional messages, individual DLT registration is required.

question.en: How long does DLT registration take?

answer.en: Traditional DLT registration takes 2-4 weeks including entity registration, header approval, and template approval across DLT platforms. With StartMessaging's pre-registered routes, you can start sending transactional SMS in under 5 minutes.

question.en: What's the difference between DLT-registered and non-DLT SMS?

answer.en: DLT-registered SMS are sent through officially registered headers and templates on India's DLT blockchain. Non-DLT approaches use pre-registered routes operated by authorized entities (like StartMessaging). Both are TRAI-compliant, but using pre-registered routes is faster and simpler for transactional messages.

heading.en: Skip DLT Registration — Start Sending SMS Today

subtext.en: ₹0.25/SMS. No DLT setup required. Free plan available.
